scenario: Off-Label — pediatric dosing hidden in an intake-form layout.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Web Intake Form
FIELD [Requester]: Dr. Lena Fischer, MD
FIELD [Organization]: Pediatric Cardiology, Denver Children's
FIELD [Product]: CholoClear-X
FIELD [Question]: What is the appropriate starting dose of CholoClear-X for a 9-year-old child with familial hypercholesterolemia? The label only covers adults — can it be used pediatrically?
labeling_notes: Form-field layout. The ask is dosing for a 9-year-old — an UNAPPROVED age group -> Off-Label.
Tests an off-label intent embedded in a structured form.
